message:
fix: align enterprise sidebar width with main sidebar default (#9840)

The enterprise sidebar was inheriting the user-resized width from the
shared sidebar config, causing it to render at ~370px instead of the
standard 256px. Add a widthOverride prop to SidebarShell so portal
sidebars can opt out of shared resize state, and wire it up in the
enterprise sidebar and layout.

Fixes #9823

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
